purpose: The code defines a simple function that returns a greeting message, likely serving as a basic health check or placeholder for a larger system.

Orchestrates a multi-stage software analysis pipeline that analyzes codebases to extract architectural insights, detect dependencies, and generate documentation artifacts including onboarding briefs and interactive graphs.

This code provides a command-line interface for analyzing and querying software repositories, enabling users to either perform a full analysis of a repository to generate artifacts or interactively query previously analyzed repositories for insights.

The KnowledgeGraph class manages and analyzes two interconnected graphs: a module dependency graph and a data lineage graph, enabling the tracking of software module relationships and data flow. It provides methods to add nodes and edges, compute graph analytics like PageRank and strongly connected components, identify dead code and data sources/sinks, and serialize/deserialize the graphs for persistence.

This code analyzes a software repository to build a dependency graph of modules, capturing their relationships and change frequency. It scans source files, extracts import dependencies using a tree-sitter analyzer, and enriches nodes with git velocity data to identify frequently changing files.

The Semanticist class orchestrates LLM-powered analysis of brownfield codebases, generating purpose statements, detecting documentation drift, clustering modules into domains, and synthesizing onboarding insights by invoking an LLM API with structured prompts and tracking token usage/costs.

Generates comprehensive architectural documentation and interactive visualizations for a software system, including a structured CODEBASE.md file with system maps, critical paths, data flows, technical debt analysis, and module purpose indexes, plus an interactive HTML graph for exploration.

This code implements a semantic search index that stores and retrieves module purpose statements based on vector embeddings, enabling similarity-based lookup of code components by their semantic meaning.

The Navigator class provides a query interface to a codebase knowledge graph, enabling semantic search for code concepts, data lineage tracing, blast radius analysis, and module explanations through a LangGraph agent with LLM integration.
Analyzes SQL queries to extract data lineage and table dependencies, identifying sources, targets, transformation types, and columns involved in data flows.
